wins: Revenue, gross margin, and earnings per share above guidance
Significant improvement in cash position and liquidity
Accelerated funding from the U.S. government, NVIDIA, and SoftBank Group
Successful collaboration with NVIDIA to create AI-focused products
Strong demand for Granite Rapids in hyperscale data centers
risks: Supply constraints on Intel 10 and Intel 7 limiting capacity
Lower gross margin in Q4 due to product mix and deconsolidation of Altera
Challenges in transitioning customers from older products to newer AI-focused offerings
Uncertainty around the timing and scale of 18A yields
High fixed costs and wafer costs impacting gross margins
